response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software engineering experience with a diverse technical background, including leadership roles and entrepreneurial ventures. While his experience in AI and cloud technologies is limited (primarily recent work with AI-agent infrastructure), his deep expertise in full-stack development, distributed systems, and infrastructure engineering could be leveraged for strategic roles. His lack of formal AI credentials or recognized expertise in AI-powered products is a notable gap for this AI-focused role.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with leadership roles
Demonstrated ability to build and scale systems (e.g., GISCollective, re:cinq)
Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective, freelance work) with ownership mindset
concerns: Limited direct experience with AI/ML technologies or cloud platforms
No advanced degrees (e.g., Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields
Recent AI-agent work is promising but lacks depth or recognition in AI strategy
